scope.legacy_note: Production remains on 115D v2 and legal-action-v3 165D. Diagnostic append-only state schemas are v3 217D, v4 765D, v5 2293D, v6 2493D and v7 3208D. Diagnostic action schemas are legal-action-v4 269D and legal-action-v5 318D resolved impact.

priority_definitions.blocker_before_retraining: The old schema cannot represent strategically central distinctions; rebuilding labels or retraining on it would bake in avoidable aliasing.
priority_definitions.important_vnext: Materially useful state that should be added in the next version but need not block an initial corrected core schema.
priority_definitions.nice_to_have: Useful context with lower expected frequency or impact.
priority_definitions.long_tail_regression: Mechanic should be covered by targeted regression tests after the main schema is stable.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Species and base species
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.baseSpecies and Pokemon.species (sim/pokemon.ts:85-86)
rows.publicly_observable: Displayed species is public on switch/details; base species may differ after form/transform and is not always public.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Slice 3 exposes separate base/current/displayed species with provenance.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v5 diagnostic uses stable dual species hashes for active and roster slots plus known/unknown masks.
rows.identity_preserved: yes in v5; no in production v2
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only; no v5 model exists.
rows.recommendation: Preserve exact/public provenance and immutable v5 ordering when rebuilding.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Transform current species versus original species
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.transformed, baseSpecies, species, storedStats and |-transform| (sim/pokemon.ts; SIM-PROTOCOL.md:529)
rows.publicly_observable: Transform target/species is public; original own identity is known.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Slice 3 handles |-transform| and preserves base/current/displayed species plus transformed state.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v5 has separate active base/current/displayed hashes and transformed flag.
rows.gap: Species identity is implemented; copied move/stat representation remains for later slices.
rows.recommendation: Preserve the identity split and add copied moves/stats without hidden leakage.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Illusion/displayed species and replacement
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.illusion and |replace|; protocol warns all prior identity assumptions are wrong (sim/pokemon.ts:131; SIM-PROTOCOL.md:285)
rows.publicly_observable: Displayed identity is public; true identity becomes public when Illusion ends.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Slice 3 reconciles the active entry on |replace| and retains prior displayed species.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v5 separates displayed/current/base identity and adds uncertainty/reveal flags.
rows.gap: Historical move reconciliation remains conservative.
rows.recommendation: Retain slot/display separation and targeted Illusion regressions.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Level, gender, form changes, active versus bench
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.level/gender/details/species/isActive; detailschange and -formechange protocol.
rows.publicly_observable: Level, gender, displayed form and active slot are generally public after reveal.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Level/gender/active extracted; permanent detailschange handled; -formechange is unhandled.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Active/HP aggregate is encoded; level, gender and form identity are absent in live v2.
rows.gap: Level/form-dependent stats and matchup identity are lost.
rows.recommendation: Encode normalized level and current form identity; add -formechange extraction. Gender can remain low priority.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Current HP, max HP, HP fraction and fainted
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.hp/maxhp/fainted and request condition (sim/pokemon.ts:134-138; SIM-PROTOCOL.md switch/damage).
rows.publicly_observable: Own exact HP/max HP; opponent public fraction under HP display rules.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: hp_text, hp_ratio and fainted; own request retains exact condition.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Own slot HP fractions, active HP, public active HP, remaining/faint fractions.
rows.gap: Live v2 does not preserve own exact max HP or associate public HP with robust species/slot identity.
rows.recommendation: Keep fractions; add normalized own exact HP/max HP only if needed for damage/value and stable revealed-slot association.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Substitute HP
rows.showdown_source_truth: Substitute volatile EffectState stores HP in true state.
rows.publicly_observable: Existence is public; exact remaining substitute HP generally is not fully public.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Volatile name only; no substitute HP.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Dedicated own/opponent substitute booleans.
rows.counterfactual_test_exists: yes for existence; no for HP
rows.gap: No substitute durability estimate.
rows.recommendation: Keep exact hidden value out of live features; optionally track public hit/damage evidence as an uncertainty feature.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Base/original types and current types
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.baseTypes, types, addedType, apparentType and knownType (sim/pokemon.ts:145 and 275+).
rows.publicly_observable: Displayed species implies base types; current type changes are announced when public.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: types initialized from species and Tera; does not update for typechange/typeadd events.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Live v2 has no current-type identity. Legacy sim featurizer has type one-hots.
rows.gap: Damage-relevant current typing is absent and can become stale after Soak, Protean/Libero, Burn Up, etc.
rows.recommendation: Extract public current type/type-add events and encode current types separately from inferred base types.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Soak and other public type changes
rows.showdown_source_truth: |-start|...|typechange|TYPE and move/ability data (moves.ts typechange emissions).
rows.publicly_observable: Yes when protocol announces the type change.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Stored as generic volatile typechange, without updating PokemonView.types.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: No type identity; volatile count may change but effect identity is lost.
rows.gap: Soaked and unsoaked states can be functionally identical to learned models.
rows.recommendation: Add a Soak/current-type counterfactual and make current type one-hots differ while base species stays fixed.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Tera type and current Terastallized type
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.teraType, terastallized, baseTypes and |-terastallize| (sim/pokemon.ts:275-278).
rows.publicly_observable: Own Tera type is private request data before use; used Tera type is public.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: tera_type, terastallized and current types are extracted.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: State vector has only known/used/available flags; action vector has Tera type one-hot and derived type-change flags.
rows.gap: State value cannot distinguish a used Fire Tera from Water Tera.
rows.recommendation: Add own known and opponent revealed Tera-type one-hots plus current Terastallized type.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Atk/Def/SpA/SpD/Spe/Accuracy/Evasion stages
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.boosts is a BoostsTable; protocol has boost/unboost/set/swap/invert/copy/clear operations.
rows.publicly_observable: Active stages are public when changed; bench stages normally reset on switch.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Per-stat boosts exist, but swapboost/invertboost/copyboost are unhandled and positive/negative clear handlers clear all.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Live v2 has only signed summed boost totals. Legacy sim featurizer preserves seven stages.
rows.counterfactual_test_exists: yes for simple boost/unboost; no for swap/invert/copy/partial clear
rows.gap: SpA -6 and Speed -6 alias; accuracy/evasion identity is also lost.
rows.recommendation: Add perspective-normalized own/opponent seven-stat stage vectors and complete protocol mutation handlers.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Own and opponent raw/current stats
rows.showdown_source_truth: baseStoredStats, storedStats and getStat effective modifiers (sim/pokemon.ts comments around 94-115).
rows.publicly_observable: Own base stored stats are in requests; opponent exact stats are hidden.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Own stats extracted; opponent stats remain hidden.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Live v2 drops all raw stat values.
rows.gap: The model cannot distinguish own fast/slow or physically/specially oriented stat profiles except through species-free proxies.
rows.recommendation: Encode normalized own active stats and belief-distribution summaries for opponent stats; never expose hidden exact opponent stats.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Effective speed and action-order context
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.speed/getStat, paralysis, boosts, Tailwind, weather abilities, Trick Room and priority.
rows.publicly_observable: Exact own speed; opponent speed is uncertain but order observations are public.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Raw own speed, boosts and field conditions are available in separate structures; no effective-speed view.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: No effective-speed or speed-order probability feature in state/action vector.
rows.gap: Speed stages, paralysis, Tailwind and Trick Room are not combined into actionable order context.
rows.recommendation: Add own effective-speed context and opponent faster-probability/bounds from public beliefs; include Trick Room inversion.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Burn, paralysis, sleep, poison/toxic and freeze identity
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.status/statusState; status protocol events.
rows.publicly_observable: Major status identity is public.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Slice 3 retains status identity and provenance per Pokémon.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v5 diagnostic has active and per-roster-slot unknown/none/brn/par/slp/psn/tox/frz/fainted enums.
rows.identity_preserved: yes in v5; no in production v2
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only; current checkpoints remain coarse.
rows.recommendation: Preserve status identity and provenance when rebuilding.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Sleep turns and toxic counter
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.statusState EffectState contains duration/counters.
rows.publicly_observable: Partly inferable from public turn history; exact internal values may be hidden or generation-dependent.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Slice 3 tracks public elapsed-turn evidence, not hidden internal counters.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v5 has sleep/toxic elapsed known masks and normalized public elapsed turns.
rows.gap: Exact hidden sleep time and Toxic stage are intentionally excluded.
rows.recommendation: Keep public evidence/bounds only.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Substitute, Taunt, Encore and Leech Seed
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.volatiles and public start/end protocol.
rows.publicly_observable: Yes.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Generic volatiles list; tactical tracker has these identities.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Dedicated booleans exist for substitute, taunt, encore and leech seed.
rows.gap: Coverage is good, but duration/Encore move identity is missing.
rows.recommendation: Retain existing fields and add Encore/Disable affected move slot where public/request-visible.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Confusion, torment, perish song/counter and partial trapping
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.volatiles EffectState; public start/end and activation events.
rows.publicly_observable: Existence is public; counters are often inferable.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Generic volatile list and tactical tracking for confusion/torment/perishsong/trapped variants.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Only volatile count; no dedicated identities or counters.
rows.gap: Mechanically distinct volatile states collapse to the same count.
rows.recommendation: Add dedicated flags and public counter/bounds for confusion, torment, perish and partial trapping.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Disable and disabled move identity
rows.showdown_source_truth: Disable volatile plus request move.disabled/disabledSource.
rows.publicly_observable: Own disabled slots are directly visible in request; opponent disable is public when announced.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Own request preserves disabled booleans; generic volatile may include disable.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: State has only disabled-move count; action has disabled flag. Disabled slot/move identity is lost.
rows.gap: Disabling the key attack versus an irrelevant move can be identical.
rows.recommendation: Encode per-slot disabled masks and affected move identity/category.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Recharge, two-turn move and lock-in
rows.showdown_source_truth: mustrecharge, twoturnmove and lockedmove volatiles; |-mustrecharge| and |-prepare| protocol.
rows.publicly_observable: Yes when activated.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: No dedicated handlers for mustrecharge/prepare; generic start events may catch some lock states.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Absent from state; action-side-effect detector knows recharge/lock only for diagnostics.
rows.gap: Forced future action and immobility are invisible.
rows.recommendation: Extract and encode recharge, two-turn phase/move and locked move; add general action consequence fields.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Choice lock and maybeLocked information boundary
rows.showdown_source_truth: Choice item effects disable moves through request generation; hidden disabled/trapping safeguards use maybeDisabled/maybeTrapped.
rows.publicly_observable: Own lock is request-visible; opponent lock is belief/inference, not exact hidden state.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Own legal moves reflect lock; maybeDisabled/maybeTrapped are dropped by normalized request.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Legal/disabled counts only; no chosen locked move or uncertainty.
rows.gap: Choice-locked move identity and uncertainty are lost.
rows.recommendation: Encode own locked move slot; opponent lock as public evidence/belief only; preserve maybeTrapped/maybeDisabled boundary flags.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Protect/Detect/Endure consecutive-use state
rows.showdown_source_truth: Protect-like volatile plus stall counter (moves.ts stallingMove/stall).
rows.publicly_observable: Prior use and failures are public; exact success probability is derivable.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Protect volatile is tracked; stall counter/duration is not exposed.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Recent protected/repeat/failure features exist, but no exact consecutive-use count.
rows.gap: Protect success odds are represented indirectly.
rows.recommendation: Add public consecutive protect-chain count and reset behavior.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Heal Block, attract, curse, flinch and niche volatiles
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.volatiles and moves/conditions data.
rows.publicly_observable: Usually public when applied; flinch is event-like and expires immediately.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Generic volatile list may retain announced effects; tactical whitelist drops most.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Only generic volatile count, if tracked at all.
rows.gap: Long-tail action constraints and residual effects alias.
rows.recommendation: Add only mechanics with measurable frequency/value after core blockers; keep protocol regression fixtures.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Current held item identity
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.item/itemState; own request includes item.
rows.publicly_observable: Own item exact; opponent item only once revealed/inferred.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Own exact/public revealed current item plus Slice 2 lifecycle fields.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v4 diagnostic uses dual stable identity hashes plus item state/source.
rows.identity_preserved: yes in v4; no in v2
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only; production checkpoints remain knownness-only.
rows.recommendation: Preserve v4 identity/provenance when the remaining slices permit dataset rebuild.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Removed, consumed, transferred and last item
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.lastItem/usedItemThisTurn; -enditem protocol distinguishes destruction/consumption tags.
rows.publicly_observable: Removal/consumption is public when announced; transfer can have silent caveats.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Slice 2 retains last item and removed/consumed lifecycle.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v4 distinguishes unknown, held, none, removed and consumed.
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only; transfer provenance remains partial.
rows.recommendation: Retain lifecycle fields and extend transfer handling later.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Item suppression/ignoring and hazard implications
rows.showdown_source_truth: Magic Room/Embargo/itemState and item/ability effect callbacks.
rows.publicly_observable: Field/volatile suppression is public; Boots may be inferred from hazard outcomes.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Slice 2 exposes Magic Room item suppression; Embargo and Boots inference remain.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v4 has item_suppressed and stable Boots identity hashes.
rows.counterfactual_test_exists: yes for Magic Room and known Boots
rows.gap: Embargo and hazard-based Boots inference remain.
rows.recommendation: Add remaining generic suppression/evidence without tactical item rules.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Base ability, current ability and revealed ability identity
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.baseAbility/ability/abilityState and -ability protocol.
rows.publicly_observable: Own exact; opponent revealed/changed ability public when announced.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Own/public base/current ability and lifecycle retained.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v4 diagnostic uses separate dual stable base/current identity hashes.
rows.identity_preserved: yes in v4; no in v2
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only; opponent belief distributions remain count-only.
rows.recommendation: Preserve exact identity and later add belief distribution embeddings.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Ability changed, suppressed or globally neutralized
rows.showdown_source_truth: -ability changes, -endability Gastro Acid, Neutralizing Gas and abilityState.
rows.publicly_observable: Public when protocol announces change/suppression or global effect.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Slice 2 handles sourced changes and direct -endability suppression.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v4 separates base/current identity and changed/suppressed state.
rows.counterfactual_test_exists: yes for sourced change and direct suppression
rows.gap: Neutralizing Gas per-target suppression remains implicit in current ability identity.
rows.recommendation: Add generic global suppression context in a later field/state slice.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Own move slots, identities, PP and disabled state
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.moveSlots/baseMoveSlots and request moves with pp/maxpp/disabled.
rows.publicly_observable: Own exact.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Own request preserves slots, IDs, PP and disabled.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: State has move count, per-slot PP and disabled count; move identity/category/type is absent from state. Action vector describes only the candidate action.
rows.gap: Two own movesets with equal counts/PP can have identical state values and switch evaluations.
rows.recommendation: Add per-slot move identity/type/category/power summaries to state or a small move-set encoder.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Opponent revealed moves and PP evidence
rows.showdown_source_truth: Public |move| history; true moveSlots hidden.
rows.publicly_observable: Move identities and uses are public; exact starting PP/Pressure interactions require inference.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: revealed_moves and possible_moves retained; tactical tracker records use counts.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Only revealed-move count and belief union count; identities are absent.
rows.gap: Revealing Earthquake versus Recover can produce the same feature change.
rows.recommendation: Encode revealed move identities/categories and public PP-use bounds; keep unrevealed moves as belief distributions.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Last move, failed result and move lock
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.lastMove/lastMoveUsed/moveLastTurnResult and public move/cant/fail events.
rows.publicly_observable: Last used move/result is public.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Tactical tracker retains last move and coarse outcomes; BattleView does not.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Failure/repetition scalars exist; last move identity is absent.
rows.gap: Choice lock, Encore and interaction-specific follow-up cannot use last-move identity.
rows.recommendation: Add own/opponent last public move identity/category and result enum.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Can Tera, used Tera, Tera type and legal Tera action
rows.showdown_source_truth: Pokemon.canTerastallize/teraType/terastallized and request canTerastallize.
rows.publicly_observable: Own availability/type known privately; opponent availability follows format/team usage, type hidden until use.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Normalized request and legal action codec preserve own availability/action; views preserve used type.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v6 diagnostic separates availability/use/active state, 18 Tera types, action availability and provenance.
rows.identity_preserved: yes in v6; no in production v2
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only; unrevealed opponent Tera remains legally unknown.
rows.recommendation: Preserve request/protocol provenance when rebuilding.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Stealth Rock, Spikes, Toxic Spikes and Sticky Web
rows.showdown_source_truth: Side.sideConditions and public side start/end protocol.
rows.publicly_observable: Yes.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Named side conditions and layers retained.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v6 adds separate Stealth Rock/Sticky Web states and exact Spikes/Toxic Spikes layer enums.
rows.gap: State identity complete; action-specific removal/set consequences remain.
rows.recommendation: Retain and add action deltas.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Reflect, Light Screen, Aurora Veil and Tailwind
rows.showdown_source_truth: Side.sideConditions with duration EffectState.
rows.publicly_observable: Identity and start/end are public; remaining duration is inferable.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Named conditions retained.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v6 diagnostic separates each side condition with active state and public elapsed evidence.
rows.identity_preserved: yes in v6; no in production v2
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only; exact hidden extended duration is intentionally excluded.
rows.recommendation: Preserve named conditions and public duration boundary.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Weather identity and duration
rows.showdown_source_truth: Field.weather/weatherState.
rows.publicly_observable: Weather identity and start/upkeep/end are public; duration often inferable.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Weather identity retained.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v6 diagnostic has explicit weather enum, provenance and public elapsed evidence.
rows.identity_preserved: yes in v6; no in production v2
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only; exact hidden duration remains excluded.
rows.recommendation: Preserve explicit identity and public evidence.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Terrain identity and duration
rows.showdown_source_truth: Field.terrain/terrainState.
rows.publicly_observable: Yes.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Terrain identity retained.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v6 diagnostic has explicit terrain enum, provenance and public elapsed evidence.
rows.identity_preserved: yes in v6; no in production v2
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only; exact hidden duration remains excluded.
rows.recommendation: Preserve explicit identity and public evidence.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Trick Room, Gravity, Magic Room and Wonder Room
rows.showdown_source_truth: Field.pseudoWeather EffectState and public field start/end.
rows.publicly_observable: Yes.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: All pseudo-weather names retained.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v6 diagnostic separates all four rooms with active state and public elapsed evidence.
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only.
rows.recommendation: Retain named room effects.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Safeguard, Mist and other side conditions
rows.showdown_source_truth: Side.sideConditions is open-ended.
rows.publicly_observable: Yes when announced.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Generic map retains announced names.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v6 diagnostic explicitly encodes Safeguard and Mist; other rare conditions remain absent.
rows.gap: Remaining rare side conditions are frequency-gated.
rows.recommendation: Keep common explicit conditions and audit long-tail frequency later.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Remaining count, revealed/fainted bench and known team members
rows.showdown_source_truth: Side.pokemon/pokemonLeft and public team/switch/faint protocol.
rows.publicly_observable: Counts and revealed members are public; hidden identities remain hidden.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: team_size, own full team and opponent revealed team retained.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: v5 diagnostic has six ordered species identity slots per side with unknown/active/bench and alive/fainted state.
rows.identity_preserved: yes in v5; no in production v2
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only; hidden opponent slots remain explicit unknowns.
rows.recommendation: Preserve request order/public reveal order and masks when rebuilding.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Turn number, side/player perspective, terminal state and format
rows.showdown_source_truth: Battle.turn/sides/ended/winner/format.
rows.publicly_observable: Yes.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Retained.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Turn and perspective-mirrored features exist; terminal/format are generally external to live vector.
rows.gap: Format identity is implicit and terminal flags are not explicit model inputs.
rows.recommendation: Keep perspective tests; add format/version ID if multiple formats are ever mixed.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Randbats hidden-set belief state and provenance
rows.showdown_source_truth: True hidden sets exist upstream but must not enter live legal views.
rows.publicly_observable: Only reveals and format priors are legal.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Possible roles optional; research belief forks sanitize hidden state.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Candidate counts, entropy, possible ability/Tera counts and reveal-known flags; identities/distributions are collapsed.
rows.gap: Belief content is reduced to counts, so strategically different candidate distributions alias.
rows.recommendation: Add compact move/item/ability/Tera distribution embeddings with explicit public-versus-inferred provenance.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Move type, category, base power, accuracy and priority
rows.showdown_source_truth: Dex move data and request move metadata.
rows.publicly_observable: Legal own move metadata is known.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Request includes all except priority; action featurizer reads bundled moves.ts.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Dedicated one-hots/numerics exist.
rows.gap: Dynamic base power/type/category callbacks are not always captured by static metadata.
rows.recommendation: Retain static fields and add resolved current-action metadata where simulator/damage engine can provide it.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Expected damage, range, effectiveness and KO chance
rows.showdown_source_truth: Resolved simulator mechanics/@smogon/calc using current state.
rows.publicly_observable: Computable from own info plus opponent public/belief assumptions.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Damage RPC produces exact Smogon or approximate diagnostics; opt-in types_override supports diagnostic current-type replacement with a documented array-merge limitation.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: legal-action-v5 diagnostic includes expected/min/max damage fractions, range width, KO/two-HKO proxy, hit chance, effectiveness/immunity/STAB and provenance.
rows.identity_preserved: yes in diagnostic v5; no in production v3
rows.gap: Implemented diagnostic-only; no v5 dataset/checkpoint and belief calibration is intentionally deferred.
rows.recommendation: Preserve availability/provenance, freeze schema, profile replays and benchmark a small diagnostic dataset before promotion.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Self and opponent per-stat deltas
rows.showdown_source_truth: Move boosts/self boosts/secondary effects in moves.ts and simulator transitions.
rows.publicly_observable: Move mechanics are known; chance may be probabilistic.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Diagnostic action_side_effects parses some self boosts; legal action has no consequence schema.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Only coarse setup flag; no signed per-stat deltas.
rows.gap: Draco Meteor, Close Combat, Parting Shot and setup distinctions are not representable.
rows.recommendation: Add signed expected self/target deltas for seven stages, chance-weighted and separated by target.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Recoil, crash, drain, healing and HP cost
rows.showdown_source_truth: Move recoil/drain/heal/self-destruct fields and simulator transitions.
rows.publicly_observable: Move mechanics known; exact HP consequence state-dependent.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Diagnostics detect boolean recoil/healing; no numeric consequence fields.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Recovery flag only; recoil/crash absent and drain magnitude absent.
rows.gap: High-recoil and no-recoil attacks can alias apart from move hash.
rows.recommendation: Add expected self-HP delta, recoil/crash fraction, drain fraction, heal fraction and self-KO flag.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Recharge, lock-in and two-turn commitment
rows.showdown_source_truth: Move flags/self volatiles mustrecharge/lockedmove/twoturnmove.
rows.publicly_observable: Move mechanics known.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Diagnostic booleans exist for recharge/lock; not in action schema.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Absent.
rows.gap: Future-action commitment is invisible to one-shot ranker.
rows.recommendation: Add recharge, lock duration/range, semi-invulnerable/two-turn and forced-next-action flags.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Pivot/switching, setup, status, hazard and removal classification
rows.showdown_source_truth: Move metadata selfSwitch, boosts, status, sideCondition and move callbacks.
rows.publicly_observable: Known from move mechanics.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Metadata parser plus tactical move-ID flags.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Pivot/setup/status/hazard/protect/recovery flags; selected removal IDs have flags.
rows.gap: Target effects and quantitative consequences are mostly missing; move-ID whitelist is incomplete.
rows.recommendation: Replace ad hoc IDs with structured effects parsed from Showdown data and expected state deltas.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Tera action flag and Tera consequences
rows.showdown_source_truth: Legal request action plus current types/Tera type and move resolution.
rows.publicly_observable: Own exact.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Separate move_tera actions.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: Strong coverage: action flag, Tera type, before/after move type and derived STAB/defensive-change flags.
rows.gap: Defensive matchup consequence is heuristic rather than resolved against opponent move beliefs.
rows.recommendation: Retain and later add belief-conditioned defensive damage deltas.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Switch target identity, typing, stats, hazards and matchup
rows.showdown_source_truth: Own request team plus field/hazard state.
rows.publicly_observable: Own exact.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Switch choice identifies slot/species; own target data available.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: HP/status/knownness/hazard vulnerability summaries; target species, current types, ability/item identities and stats absent.
rows.gap: Strategically different switch targets can share the same feature vector.
rows.recommendation: Add switch-target species/type/stat/item/ability/move-set embeddings and resolved entry-hazard HP delta.

rows.mechanic_state_field: Consequences represented as next-state deltas
rows.showdown_source_truth: Authoritative result exists only after simulator transition.
rows.publicly_observable: Can be estimated through exact seeded research or belief-conditioned branches; unavailable exactly in ordinary live play.
rows.sim_core_extracted_view: Branch tools can score resulting views; live approximate recommender does not produce authoritative next state.
rows.ai_feature_encoding: legal-action-v5 includes immediate expected opponent-HP delta and explicit immediate/branch/unavailable source; full future deltas require supplied branch labels.
rows.counterfactual_test_exists: Draco transition, branch tests and Slice 6 immediate-impact tests exist
rows.gap: Immediate damage is represented, but own HP, status, field, terminal and future-position consequences require authoritative transition labels.
rows.recommendation: Generate simulator-derived next-state/action-value labels only after final schema freeze and replay profiling.
